PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Continued To Sep-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Boris Siegel appeared by telephone for Charles Harris (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there isn't enough here to say that Ms. Harris is deceased, that the private investigator spent two days doing the investigation in the middle of a pandemic, that it does not know what the investigator did and noted that there was no checking of public benefits that may have been provided to Ms. Harris, or hospitals, or social security, etc. Mr. Siegel requested time to supplement the investigator's report. The Court stated that there wasn't a lot of details of what was done and that the supplement needs to show that they have exhausted all efforts. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to September 22, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Jul-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
